title: Tax Refunds Are Up 11.5% This Year. Who Is Getting the Most.
summary: Refunds rose 11.5% through the end of February, providing a boon to high-income households, in particular.

title: BofA urges investors to buy these 3 sectors, not the S&P 500
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America said in a note Monday that clients should favour energy, consumer staples, and large-cap value stocks over the broader S&P 500, arguing that key risks are not fully reflected in the benchmark’s valuation.

title: These 2 Finance Stocks Could Beat Earnings: Why They Should Be on Your Radar
summary: Why investors should use the Zacks Earnings ESP tool to help find stocks that are poised to top quarterly earnings estimates.

title: BofA's Mensah Sees 'Healthy Cleanup' in Private Markets
summary: Bernard Mensah, who leads Bank of America Corp.'s international operations, says signs of strain in parts of the private credit market present an opportunity for "a very good, healthy cleanup." Speaking on Bloomberg Television, Mensah adds: "It'll shine a light on it. It will force people to look at their positions."

title: Bank Of America Uses Zelle To Speed Charitable Giving And Deepen Ties
summary: Zelle and Bank of America have introduced near real time digital charitable disbursements from Donor Advised Funds to nonprofits. The partnership replaces legacy paper based grant processes with faster, electronic transfers. The new capability is designed to help nonprofits receive and use charitable funding more quickly and securely. For investors watching NYSE:BAC, this move sits alongside a mixed recent share performance picture, with the stock at $46.72 and a 16.8% return over 1 year...
